Servlet/RegistrationForm/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch compiler configuration from source/target to release flag and set Java version to 21.
Servlet/RegistrationForm/pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets Java 21; using source/target 11 would result in bytecode incompatible with the target JDK or fail to utilize Java 21 features, and the release flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation.
